grant_and_term.franchise_type: Single-unit franchise for upscale full-service hotel
grant_and_term.initial_term: 20 years from first day of month Hotel opens
grant_and_term.successor_term: 10 years on then-current terms (may be materially different)
grant_and_term.entity_requirement: Only entities (not individuals) may acquire franchises
grant_and_term.location: Must operate only from specific approved site
grant_and_term.burden_level: Moderate — long term but renewal on different terms

fee_obligations.royalty: 6% GRR + 3% Gross F&B Revenue, monthly by EFT
fee_obligations.burden_level: High — total fee load approaches 14-17% of rooms revenue

site_and_construction.site_approval: Hyatt must approve site before FA signed
site_and_construction.design_construction_standards: Must comply with Hyatt's Design and Construction Standards
site_and_construction.plan_approval: Must submit and get approval of all plans; no changes without approval
site_and_construction.pip_for_conversions: Property Improvement Plan required for conversions
site_and_construction.opening_deadline: 24 months (new) or 6 months (conversion) after signing FA
site_and_construction.pre_opening_conditions: 7 conditions including inspection, training completion, insurance, certificates
site_and_construction.mixed_use_restrictions: No pawnshops, adult businesses, marijuana, gambling without consent; bar within 300ft needs consent
site_and_construction.burden_level: High — complete design and operational control by franchisor

training_obligations.initial_program: 7-part program totaling 277-316 classroom hrs + 55-112 OJT hrs
training_obligations.gmu_required: GM must complete GMU (53-58 hrs) before opening or within 6 months of hire
training_obligations.replacement_training: New Core Management must complete applicable training within 90 days
training_obligations.ongoing: Annual retraining for Human Trafficking and Global Privacy; periodic conventions mandatory
training_obligations.fees: Franchisee pays all training fees + travel/living for all attendees
training_obligations.burden_level: High — extensive, ongoing, at franchisee's cost

operational_obligations.system_standards: 3,641 pages of standards; must comply as periodically modified
operational_obligations.technology_system: Must use designated systems (Opera PMS, POS, etc.); Hyatt has unlimited data access
operational_obligations.capital_reserve: 5% of total operating revenue monthly for future upgrades
operational_obligations.upgrades: Hyatt may require upgrades/renovations at any time to match current standards
operational_obligations.management_company: Must use Hyatt-approved management company or self-manage with approval
operational_obligations.core_management: Must maintain full Core Management team at all times; full-time dedication required
operational_obligations.fb_spa_operators: Must get Hyatt approval; operators must comply with all System Standards

curable_defaults.trigger: Failure to provide real estate docs/insurance

non_curable_defaults: Cease Hotel operations or lose possession
Actions reflecting adversely on Hyatt or Proprietary Marks
Violation of law (including trade restriction laws)
termination_triggers.burden_level: High — many triggers, short cure periods

conditions: Sign then-current agreements (may be materially different)
transfer_restrictions.permitted_without_approval: Non-Controlling Ownership transfers if no Competing Brand Owner, no accumulated control, notice within 30 days
transfer_restrictions.right_of_first_offer: Only if Exhibit C executed (strategic markets)
transfer_restrictions.burden_level: High — significant conditions, ongoing liability after transfer

noncompete.during_term: Neither franchisee nor management company may be Competing Brand Owner (5+ hotels under competing full-service trade name with ADR >= 60% of Brand Hotels)
noncompete.burden_level: Moderate — no post-term restriction but significant during-term limitation

guaranty.scope: Personal, unlimited guaranty of ALL FA obligations (monetary and non-monetary)
guaranty.who_must_sign: Controlling Ownership Interest holders as Hyatt specifies
guaranty.monetary_threshold: Minimum net worth and liquidity, CPI-adjusted annually
guaranty.annual_reporting: Must provide financial statements demonstrating threshold compliance
guaranty.burden_level: Very high — unlimited personal liability for entity obligations

liquidated_damages.formula: min(60, remaining_months) x (avg_monthly_GRR x 6% + avg_monthly_F&B x 3% + avg_monthly_GRR x 3% + rooms x $36.25/CPI)
liquidated_damages.condemnation_termination_agreement: No damages if sign Termination Agreement + release; but $6,500/room if build competing hotel in AOP within 24 months
liquidated_damages.burden_level: Very high — damages can be very large for a 500-room hotel

dispute_resolution.venue: Within 10 miles of Hyatt's principal office (Chicago)
dispute_resolution.burden_level: High — franchisee must travel to Chicago for all disputes

insurance.requirement: Adequate coverage in amounts Hyatt periodically specifies
insurance.if_franchisee_fails: Hyatt may obtain insurance and charge premiums + $200/room/year

indemnification.scope: Franchisee must reimburse Hyatt and related parties for all claims arising from application, Hotel development or operation, breach, and proportionate share of multi-hotel defense costs

force_majeure.casualty_provisions: If damage cost <= Damage Threshold (60% market value or insurance proceeds), must repair within 4 months start / 24 months reopen. If exceeds threshold, may terminate with payment = min(liquidated damages, Net Recovery).
force_majeure.term_extension: FA term extended for period Hotel is closed
force_majeure.fee_relief: No Royalty/System Services Charges while closed (unless receiving business interruption insurance)
force_majeure.burden_level: Moderate — some relief but still significant obligations

distinctive_clauses: Competing Brand Owner restriction instead of traditional noncompete
Guarantor Monetary Threshold with CPI adjustment
AOP with expiration (1-5 years) — minimal long-term territorial protection
Right of first offer only for strategic markets (Exhibit C)
Guest Information is franchisor's property during term
Assignment of all Innovations to franchisor
